nasb.text: I looked on the earth, and behold, it was formless and void; And to the heavens, and they had no light.

esv.text: I looked on the earth, and behold, it was without form and void; and to the heavens, and they had no light.

cnv.text: 我觀看地，地是空虛混沌； 我仰視天，天上也全然無光。

ccb.text: 我俯瞰大地， 一片空虚混沌； 我仰望天空，毫无亮光。
